dataList.name:
Full Moon 2025
Commemorative
ID Upgrade Pack
dataList.desc:
A limited Full Moon 2025 Campaign Commemorative Pack. Contains the following items:

· Takeoff Module - ID Uptie x1
· Identity Training Ticket IV x140

※ Using the Takeoff Module - ID Uptie raises the selected Identity's Аптай to 4.

dataList.name:
Full Moon 2025
Commemorative
Донаты на прохождение игры
dataList.desc:
A limited Full Moon 2025 Campaign Commemorative Pack. Contains the following items:

· Decaextraction Ticket x3
· Takeoff Module - Э.Г.О Spinning [WAW] x1

※ Using the Takeoff Module - Э.Г.О Spinning [WAW] raises the selected Э.Г.О's Тредспин to 4. (Usable only on Э.Г.Оs WAW Уровень or lower)

dataList.name:
Full Moon 2025
Commemorative
Complete Pack
dataList.desc:
A limited Full Moon 2025 Campaign Commemorative Pack. Contains the following items:

· Decaextraction Ticket x4
· Takeoff Module - ID Uptie x1
· Takeoff Module - Э.Г.О Spinning [WAW] x1
· Identity Training Ticket IV x140
· Threads x100

※ Using the Takeoff Module - ID Uptie raises the selected Identity's Аптай to 4.

※ Using the Takeoff Module - Э.Г.О Spinning [WAW] raises the selected Э.Г.О's Тредспин to 4. (Usable only on Э.Г.Оs WAW Уровень or lower)
